title: Tool: get_entity (one-hop neighborhood)
userStory: As the agent, I want a get_entity tool so that I can pull a specific entity plus its immediate neighbors when a search hit needs more context.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Graphiti get_node by entity id or name and traverses one hop
Returns the entity attributes plus all related entities, episodes, and edges
Tool registered with the chat endpoint
Verify: get_entity('<known-entity>') returns the entity plus expected one-hop neighbors from the migrated graph
